overall.description: First-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player character crosses streets and walks along sidewalks surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, vertical gardens with purple neon lighting, and futuristic vehicles. The wet streets reflect the vibrant artificial lighting, creating a dense urban atmosphere typical of a high-fidelity game engine render.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the ego crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk at night, surrounded by the glow of neon signs. After crossing, the camera continues along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella. The speed limit 40 sign remains visible as the character moves deeper into the urban environment.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor between towering cyberpunk structures, the camera pans up to reveal massive holographic advertisements including a prominent 'BRAIN DANCE' sign. The left side features distinctive vertical gardens with purple neon lighting, while pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The environment feels enclosed and sheltered from the open sky.

segments.scene_description: The ego continues along the sidewalk past construction barriers on the left, approaching a major intersection. The vertical gardens give way to open street views with large digital billboards becoming visible. The wet asphalt of the upcoming crosswalk reflects the surrounding neon lights, signaling a transition to a more open urban space.

segments.scene_description: The ego enters a wide, bustling intersection filled with moderate crowds of pedestrians crossing together. Futuristic vehicles including a distinctive pink-green sports car and a police car navigate the wet streets. Towering holographic advertisement towers dominate the left side while palm trees line the center, creating a vibrant, open urban plaza atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the ego continues along the opposite sidewalk lined with street planters and commercial storefronts. The dense crowd disperses as the camera moves past digital signage and neon-lit building entrances, maintaining a steady pace through the perpetually illuminated cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk district, moving from a sheltered urban corridor into a wide, bustling city plaza. It begins with the camera crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk and proceeding along a concrete sidewalk past a pedestrian with an umbrella. As the path narrows between towering structures, the view pans upward to reveal massive holographic advertisements and purple neon vertical gardens before shifting past construction barriers toward a major intersection. The scene then opens into a vibrant, wide plaza where wet asphalt reflects the glow of digital billboards and futuristic vehicles, including a pink-green sports car, navigate through crowds of pedestrians and palm trees. Finally, the camera moves beyond the intersection along a sidewalk lined with street planters and commercial storefronts, gliding past illuminated building entrances into the depths of the city.
